hotel_name: Khách sạn Red Sun Sài Gòn (Red Sun Sài Gòn Hotel)

reviews.title: Utility
reviews.text: The accommodation near the airport is only about a 5-minute taxi ride away, convenient for domestic or international flights, located near convenience stores, and the dining area is just a five-minute walk. Affordable prices. OK, good.

reviews.title: Experience at Redsun
reviews.text:
About cleanliness: The room has mosquitoes, but not many. The cleanliness is considered acceptable since there is no foul smell or dirt.  
About the location: Quite okay, near the airport and the place I need to go.  
About amenities: This is the biggest drawback, in the first room I stayed, the air conditioner was very weak, even when set to the coldest at 18 degrees, it was still not cool, just bearable, and it took about 30 minutes for the sweat to dry. After moving to the second room, the air conditioner was better. Many TVs in the rooms did not work; it took a long time to find one that worked, and even that had very few good channels, no K+ and no YouTube, so there was almost no entertainment.  
The soundproofing was terrible; I could hear all the outside noise, so there was almost no privacy.

reviews.title: Travel
reviews.text: The hotel is very clean, and the owner is very nice. Everything is great.

reviews.title: Good experience
reviews.text: Friendly staff, easy to talk to. The room is decent, with a view of the park, and the cleanliness of the room is quite good. The facilities are a bit old, but the price is reasonable compared to my experience.

reviews.title: Okay
reviews.text: Convenient location, right on the street. Friendly staff, allowed for early check-in. The room is quite clean, the bathroom is a bit small, and there is no soap or shampoo available.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is clean and has an elevator. It is also spacious and comfortable. However, my room has a bit of a moldy smell, I hope the hotel can improve that. Additionally, the TV in my room is not working. Everything else is fine. Overall, it's worth the money. I mistakenly booked the wrong date and called the hotel, and they still supported me. 100 points for the hotel! ❤️
